title: Production API Gateway Down
description: API gateway returning 502 errors for all requests. Approximately 3,500 customers affected. Started at 14:32 UTC. Load balancer health checks failing on all 4 API gateway instances.

title: Database Primary Failover Required
description: Primary PostgreSQL database (db-prod-primary-01) is unresponsive. Replication lag on standby is 0 seconds — standby is current. Manual failover required to restore write operations. Application is in read-only mode.

title: High CPU on Web Server Cluster
description: CPU utilization averaging 94% across web-prod-[01-06] for the past 22 minutes. P95 response time degraded from 180ms to 2,100ms. Auto-scaling triggered but new instances are not yet healthy.

title: Suspicious Authentication Spike
description: SIEM detected 847 failed authentication attempts against the admin portal from IP range 185.220.x.x (Tor exit nodes) in the last 10 minutes. 3 accounts have been locked due to brute-force protection.

title: Celery Worker Queue Backlog
description: SQS queue depth for async task processing has grown to 4,200 messages. Current processing rate is 45 msg/min vs normal 380 msg/min. 2 of 8 worker instances appear to be hanging on a specific job type.
